channel.title: Student Panel on IDPicker Docs
channel.description: Recent content in Student Panel on IDPicker Docs

item.title: 01. Authentication Guide
item.description:
Login with Email and Password

  1. Open Access URLs.
  2. Visit the Main Platform Login URL.
  3. Enter email and password.
  4. Click Sign In.
  5. Verify dashboard load.

Image placeholder: Add screenshot of student login form and success redirect.

Login with Google OAuth

  1. On login page, click Continue with Google.
  2. Select account and approve access.
  3. Verify redirect to Student Dashboard.

Image placeholder: Add screenshot sequence for OAuth start and dashboard redirect.

item.title: 02. Dashboard Guide
item.description:
Dashboard Purpose

The dashboard centralizes mentor access, assessments, reports, and upgrade flow.

Steps

  1. Log in as student.
  2. Review top cards and pillar widgets.
  3. Open AI Mentor from dashboard CTA.
  4. Open each core pillar and confirm page navigation.
  5. Open reports and subscription CTA.

Image placeholder: Add full dashboard screenshot with numbered annotations.

item.title: 03. Assessment Guide
item.description:
Start an Assessment

  1. Open Assessments from dashboard.
  2. Begin questionnaire.
  3. Answer all required questions.
  4. Submit and wait for processing.

Resume Interrupted Session

  1. Return to Assessments.
  2. Select Resume.
  3. Continue from the last unanswered item.

View Results

  1. Open completed assessment card.
  2. Review summary and details.

Image placeholder: Add screenshots for start, in-progress, and completed states.

item.title: 04. Recommendation Guide
item.description:
View Recommendations

  1. Complete assessment.
  2. Open Recommendations section.
  3. Review suggested career paths and rationale.

Download Recommendation Report

  1. Click Download Recommendations.
  2. Save file locally.
  3. Verify downloaded content opens correctly.

Image placeholder: Add recommendation list and download button screenshot.

item.title: 05. Personality Guide
item.description:
Open Personality Results

  1. Navigate to Personality section.
  2. Open latest completed assessment.

Interpret Radar Chart

Review trait values such as:

  • Social Adaptability
  • Emotional Regulation
  • Cognitive Flexibility
  • Achievement Motivation

Image placeholder: Add radar chart screenshot with trait labels and score values.

item.title: 06. AI Mentorship Guide
item.description:
Start Mentor Chat

  1. From dashboard, click Engage Your Mentor.
  2. Type your question.
  3. Continue conversation with follow-up prompts.

Get Guided Advice

  1. Open Guided Advice from mentor panel.
  2. Review step-by-step recommendations.

Image placeholder: Add chat screenshot with example mentor response.

item.title: 07. University Search Guide
item.description:
Search Programs

  1. Open University Search.
  2. Enter university or program keyword.
  3. Review matching results.

Filter Results

Use filters for:

  • Field of study
  • Degree type
  • Language

Open Program Details

  1. Click a program card.
  2. Review tuition, duration, country, and language.

Image placeholder: Add screenshot with active filters and result cards.

item.title: 08. Resources Guide
item.description:
Access Shared Resources

  1. Open Resources from navigation.
  2. Browse advisor-shared files.

Find Specific Material

  1. Use search by title/description/file name.
  2. Apply filters by type, size, and visibility.
  3. Sort results as needed.

Open or Download File

  1. Click resource item.
  2. Open preview or download.

Image placeholder: Add resources page screenshot with filters and counters.

item.title: 09. Help Center Guide
item.description:
Submit a Ticket

  1. Open Help Center.
  2. Click Submit New Ticket.
  3. Fill subject, category, priority, description.
  4. Submit and note ticket ID.

Track Existing Tickets

  1. Open My Tickets.
  2. Check status updates.
  3. Open ticket for details.

Image placeholder: Add ticket submission and My Tickets screenshot.

item.title: 10. Subscription Guide
item.description:
Upgrade Plan

  1. Click Upgrade from dashboard or restricted feature prompt.
  2. Compare plans.
  3. Select desired tier.
  4. Complete payment/confirmation flow.

Image placeholder: Add plan comparison and upgrade button screenshot.

item.title: 11. Account and Settings Guide
item.description:
Profile Updates

  1. Open Settings.
  2. Edit profile fields.
  3. Save changes.

Security

  1. Open Password and Security.
  2. Change password.
  3. Confirm with current credentials.

Account Deletion

  1. Open Delete Account.
  2. Confirm action.
  3. Verify logout and account removal.

Parent Access

  1. Invite parent/guardian.
  2. Review linked access.
  3. Remove access when needed.

Image placeholder: Add settings page screenshot with profile and security sections.

item.title: 12. Language Guide
item.description:
Change Language

  1. Open language switch from header.
  2. Select EN or TR.
  3. Confirm all labels update instantly.

Validate Language State

  1. Navigate to a different page.
  2. Confirm selected language persists.

Image placeholder: Add before/after screenshots for EN and TR mode.
